summary: Phase 17 Case Conversation Thread - All features working correctly. Backend APIs tested via pytest (16 passed). Frontend tested via Playwright - Customer Messages tab and RM Portal Conversation section both functional. Message bubbles display correctly with customer=right/dark, RM=left/light styling and role labels.
seed_data_creation: Test data exists: lead_21668ed1ecd9 has 12+ messages in thread (customer messages, RM replies, admin messages). Thread includes test messages from pytest and Playwright tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 17 Case Conversation Thread fully tested. Customer login: /login -> Customer Sign In -> password sign-in -> credentials. Customer messages at /my-cases/:caseId -> Messages tab shows conversation thread with message bubbles (customer=right/dark, RM=left/light), role labels (RELATIONSHIP MANAGER, VENULOQ ADMIN), timestamps, and compose input. RM Portal: /team/rm/conversion/:leadId -> Portal tab shows Conversation section with collapsed preview (latest customer message), unread badge, expand/collapse toggle, full thread view, and reply input.

backend_apis.GET /api/case-thread/{lead_id}/customer: PASS - Customer retrieves thread, messages sanitized (no sender_id), role_label included
backend_apis.POST /api/case-thread/{lead_id}/customer: PASS - Customer sends message, validates empty/long text, notifies RM
backend_apis.GET /api/case-thread/{lead_id}/internal: PASS - RM/Admin retrieves full thread with sender_id, unread_by_customer count
backend_apis.POST /api/case-thread/{lead_id}/internal: PASS - RM/Admin sends reply, visible to customer, creates audit log
backend_apis.GET /api/case-thread/{lead_id}/unread: PASS - Returns unread count per role (customer sees RM messages, RM sees customer messages)
backend_apis.read_receipts: PASS - Reading thread auto-marks messages as read
backend_apis.access_control: PASS - Customer cannot access internal endpoint, unauthenticated blocked

customer_portal.my_cases_page: PASS - Shows 4 case cards with BottomTabBar, Requests tab highlighted
customer_portal.case_detail_page: PASS - Shows 5 tabs (Shared Items, Payments, Messages, Timeline, Contact RM)
customer_portal.messages_tab: PASS - Shows conversation thread with message bubbles
customer_portal.message_bubbles: PASS - Customer messages right/dark, RM messages left/light with role labels
customer_portal.unread_badge: PASS - Blue badge on Messages tab shows unread count
customer_portal.message_input: PASS - Textarea with send button, sends message on click
customer_portal.message_sending: PASS - New message appears in thread after sending

rm_portal.portal_tab: PASS - Shows in tab bar with share icon badge
rm_portal.conversation_section: PASS - Shows 'Conversation' header with unread badge
rm_portal.collapsed_preview: PASS - Shows 'Latest from customer:' with last message text and date
rm_portal.expanded_thread: PASS - Shows all messages with sender name, role label, timestamp
rm_portal.internal_message_input: PASS - Textarea with send button for RM replies
rm_portal.rm_reply_sending: PASS - New message appears in thread after sending
rm_portal.unread_by_customer_indicator: PASS - Shows count of messages not yet read by customer

message_styling.customer_messages: PASS - Right-aligned, dark background (#0B0B0D), white text, rounded-br-md
message_styling.rm_messages: PASS - Left-aligned, white background, dark text, rounded-bl-md, gold role label
message_styling.admin_messages: PASS - Same as RM with 'VENULOQ ADMIN' role label
message_styling.timestamps: PASS - Shows time in HH:MM format below message text

previous_phases.phase_15_shared_items: PASS - Shared Items tab still works with lifecycle badges
previous_phases.phase_16_payments: PASS - Payments tab still works with Pay Now, payment history

mocked_apis.razorpay: Razorpay is in TEST MODE (rzp_test_demo). Payments are simulated via /simulate endpoint. No real card processing.
